_comment: Civil legal aid + court self-help — community connectors only. Provider-specific public-facing intake integrations (e.g., LawDroid's Legal Information Assistant and Voice Intake Assistant, which feed upstream caller conversations into the plugin's eligibility-screening and client-intake skills) are not bundled here; deploying offices can add them via the office's CLAUDE.md integrations table if licensed.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.

CourtListener.title: CourtListener
CourtListener.description: Free Law Project's legal research platform — U.S. court opinions, PACER dockets, judge profiles, citation verification.

Courtroom5.title: Courtroom5
Courtroom5.description: Jurisdiction-aware guidance for self-represented litigants — case intake, deadline calculations, procedural next steps.

Descrybe.title: Descrybe
Descrybe.description: Primary law research — search cases by concept or wording, find cases from citations, extract authorities, verify quoted language.
